dashboard.noActivity: No activity yet. Create a resume or application to get started.
dashboard.trackAJob: Track a job you've applied to.
dashboard.emptyResumesHint: Create your first resume version to get started.

applications.title: Applications
applications.subtitle: Track every job you've applied to and what's next.
applications.emptyHint: Add a job application to start tracking it.

settings.title: AI Settings
settings.subtitle: Connect your own AI key to enable “Improve with AI” suggestions across your resume sections.
settings.builtInHeading: ✓ AI suggestions are built in — no setup needed.
settings.builtInBody: Open any resume, then click ✦ Improve with AI on the Summary or a Work Experience entry. You get {limit} free suggestions per day{used}.
settings.notConfigured: Built-in AI isn’t configured on this deployment yet. You can still use AI by adding your own key below.
settings.advancedToggle: Advanced: use your own API key (optional)
settings.advancedHintBuiltIn: Optional — only if you want unlimited suggestions on your own account, bypassing the daily limit.
settings.advancedHintNoKey: Add a key to enable AI suggestions.
settings.byokBanner: Bring your own AI key (BYOK) for unlimited use on your own account. Create a key at openrouter.ai/keys — one key works with GPT, Claude, Gemini and more. Usage is billed to your OpenRouter account; your key is encrypted and stored in your own Google Drive, never on our servers.
settings.modelHint: Any slug from <link>openrouter.ai/models</link>. Cheaper models (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, claude-3.5-haiku) are plenty for resume edits.
settings.keySavedPlaceholder: Key saved ({masked}). Enter a new key to replace.
settings.keyConfigured: ✓ A key is configured. Leave this blank to keep it.

signin.headline: Land more interviews with resumes built to <accent>beat the ATS</accent>.
signin.sub: Resumeflow-ATS helps you tailor each resume to the job, track every application, and prepare for interviews — all in one place, with your data saved privately to your own Google Drive.
signin.feature1Desc: Match every resume to the job description in seconds.
signin.feature2Desc: Clean, parseable templates that applicant-tracking systems can read.
signin.feature3Desc: See all your roles in one clear pipeline, from saved to offer.
signin.feature4Desc: Get AI-generated questions and answer guidance for each job.
signin.feature5Desc: Download polished PDF, Word, and PowerPoint versions.
signin.feature6Desc: Your data is saved to your own Google Drive — not our servers.
signin.getStartedSub: Sign in to create your first tailored resume in minutes.
signin.scopeNote: We request access only to Resumeflow-ATS's own app data folder in your Google Drive.
